# Three-Voice Imitative Passage provenance

- Title: _Three-Voice Imitative Passage_
- Composer: Vellum project fixture
- License: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain Dedication
- Source: Created for Vellum's deterministic imitative-counterpoint golden path
- Files: `imitative-passage.ly` and `imitative-passage.pdf`

This short original passage is dedicated to the public domain. Its four-note
subject has the interval-rhythm shape `+2, +2, +3` in equal quarter notes. The
subject enters in Voice I in measure 1, Voice II at the fifth in measure 2, and
Voice III at the octave in measure 3. All three voices continue independently
to a C-major cadential goal in measure 4.

The PDF is the immutable Source Artifact. The LilyPond source is reviewed
canonical truth used to distinguish recognition drift from failures in texture
classification, intabulation search, lineage, and Preservation Audit.
